title: Repo-local self-improvement skill closeout

issue_classifications.title: [Workspace]: Add a repo-local self-improvement skill for system-intent-driven dogfooding
issue_classifications.evidence: Added tools/skills/self-improvement-dogfooding/SKILL.md, registered it in tools/skills/REGISTRY.json, listed it in tools/skills/README.md, and verified agentic-workspace skills recommends it for repeat system-intent-driven dogfooding improvement.

goal: Confirm #379 added repo-local self-improvement dogfooding guidance without making it shipped package authority.
non_goals: Do not ship a generic autopilot subsystem or give the skill authority over system intent.

review_mode.review question: Is the dogfooding loop repo-owned, bounded, discoverable, and routed through existing package commands?

review_method.commands used: uv run agentic-workspace skills --target . --task "repeat system-intent-driven dogfooding improvement" --format json; uv run pytest tests/test_workspace_cli.py -q; uv run ruff check src tests
review_method.evidence sources: tools/skills/self-improvement-dogfooding/SKILL.md, tools/skills/REGISTRY.json, tools/skills/README.md, skills command recommendation output

retention.closeout shape: shrink or archive after findings are routed
retention.proof surface: this review record plus routed follow-up residue

validation_commands: uv run agentic-workspace skills --target . --task "repeat system-intent-driven dogfooding improvement" --format json
uv run ruff check src tests
drift_log: 2026-04-26: Closeout recorded after skill discovery and selected proof passed.
